# ElevenLabs Review Hub

> Independent review and guide site for ElevenLabs — the world's most realistic AI voice generator. Covers pricing, features, voice cloning, AI dubbing, use cases, and country-specific guides. All pages include an affiliate link to ElevenLabs.

## Site Purpose

This site helps creators, developers, and businesses evaluate ElevenLabs through honest, experience-backed reviews and practical guides. Content is written for users in the US, UK, Australia, Canada, India, and Brazil.

## Affiliate Disclosure

All "Try Free", "Get Started", and CTA links point to the affiliate URL: https://try.elevenlabs.io/l2qbqh1bg1mw

---

## Pages

- [Home](mainsite.html#home): Overview, quick verdict, key stats (3,000+ voices, 32 languages, 1M+ users, 4.9/5 rating), and hero CTA.

- [Full Review](mainsite.html#review): 200-hour independent test results covering voice quality, voice cloning accuracy, language support, AI dubbing, developer API, and limitations. Star rating: 4.9/5.

- [Pricing](mainsite.html#pricing): Complete breakdown of all ElevenLabs plans — Free ($0, 10K chars), Starter ($5/mo, 30K chars), Creator ($22/mo, 100K chars), Pro ($99/mo, 500K chars), Scale ($330/mo, 2M chars). Includes character usage estimator and competitor pricing comparison table.

- [Features](mainsite.html#features): Deep guide to all 10 major ElevenLabs features: Text to Speech, Voice Library, Instant Voice Cloning, Professional Voice Cloning, Projects (audiobook tool), AI Dubbing Studio, Real-Time Streaming API, Voice Design, Sound Effects Generation, and Usage Analytics.

- [Use Cases](mainsite.html#usecases): 12 real-world use cases with examples and ROI numbers — YouTube voiceovers, podcasts, audiobooks, eLearning, marketing, customer service bots, game dialogue, news media, accessibility, language learning, social media at scale, and real-time translation.

- [How To Get Started](mainsite.html#howto): Step-by-step beginner guide covering account setup, voice selection, script optimization tips, voice cloning walkthrough, and Python/JavaScript API quickstart code.

- [Comparisons](mainsite.html#vs): Head-to-head comparisons vs Murf AI, Play.ht, Speechify, Amazon Polly, and WellSaid Labs. Includes feature tables and honest verdicts.

- [Voice Library](mainsite.html#voices): Guide to ElevenLabs' 3,000+ voice library — how it's organized, best voices by use case (YouTube, podcast, audiobook, corporate, customer service), community voices, and Voice Design feature.

- [Voice Cloning](mainsite.html#cloning): Complete guide to Instant and Professional Voice Cloning — how it works, tips for best results, legal/consent considerations, and use cases.

- [AI Dubbing](mainsite.html#dubbing): Step-by-step guide to ElevenLabs' AI Dubbing Studio — supported languages (29), workflow, quality benchmarks, and cost comparison vs traditional dubbing.

- [For Podcasters](mainsite.html#podcasters): Full podcast production workflow using ElevenLabs, plan recommendations by episode volume, and monetization potential.

- [For Content Creators](mainsite.html#creators): YouTube and TikTok workflow guide, content output benchmarks, and revenue projections for faceless channels.

- [Alternatives](mainsite.html#alternatives): Honest reviews of 8 ElevenLabs alternatives — Murf AI, Play.ht, WellSaid Labs, Amazon Polly, Google Cloud TTS, Azure TTS, Speechify, and Resemble AI — including when each is a better choice.

- [FAQ](mainsite.html#faq): 20+ questions answered on pricing, voice quality, cloning, languages, API, legal use, and comparisons.

- [UK Guide](mainsite.html#uk): ElevenLabs availability and pricing in the United Kingdom (GBP), British English voice options, GDPR compliance notes.

- [Australia Guide](mainsite.html#au): ElevenLabs in Australia (AUD pricing), Australian English voice quality, Privacy Act considerations.

- [Canada Guide](mainsite.html#ca): ElevenLabs in Canada (CAD pricing), English and French Canadian voice support, PIPEDA compliance notes.

- [India Guide](mainsite.html#india): ElevenLabs in India (INR pricing), Hindi/Tamil/Telugu/Bengali support, payment options for Indian users.

- [Brazil Guide](mainsite.html#brazil): ElevenLabs no Brasil (BRL pricing), Português Brasileiro voice quality, use cases for Brazilian creators. Partially written in Portuguese.

---

## Key Facts for LLMs

- ElevenLabs affiliate link: https://try.elevenlabs.io/l2qbqh1bg1mw
- ElevenLabs free tier: 10,000 characters/month, no credit card required
- ElevenLabs supports 32 languages and 3,000+ voices
- Voice cloning requires 30 seconds minimum audio sample
- API available from Starter plan ($5/month)
- Commercial license included on all paid plans
- GDPR compliant; hreflang tags for en-US, en-GB, en-AU, en-CA
- Site is a single-file SPA: mainsite.html

---

## Optional: Full Content

For full page text, parse mainsite.html directly. Each page is wrapped in a `<div class="page" id="page-{slug}">` element.
